query_text: Plan a 3-day trip for 7 people from Martha's Vineyard to Charlotte from November 14th to November 16th, 2024, with a budget of $8,100. Include visits to museums as part of the itinerary.

properties.description: The NASCAR Hall of Fame is where legends live on. Where fun lives on. Where the race lives on. Enjoy amazing artifacts, interactive exhibits, simulator rides and special events at the High Octane Theater. Plus, you can grab a bite to eat in the NASCAR Hall of Fame Café or at the Buffalo Wild Wings restaurant. You also can take home a souvenir at the gift shop to help you remember it all.

properties.description: Hands-on science Museum in Uptown Charlotte featuring interactive exhibitions, the Carolinas' largest IMAX screen and one-of-a-kind Accenture IMAX Dome Theatre and educational programs. And don't forget: We offer summer camps and birthday parties so take advantage of both options before these spaces fill up completely!

properties.name: Discovery Place Science

properties.description:
The reimagined Sullenberger Aviation Museum reopened on June 1, 2024. The new 35,000 square foot main gallery houses two thematic areas: 1) Aviation Society is about the people and companies that make up the aerospace industry in the Carolinas and features oral histories from people who have shaped its business and culture in recent years. 2) Innovation Nation features iconic aircraft that represent significant advances in technology, design, and safetyn starting with Orville and Wilbur Wright. Hands-on activities encourage visitors and students to write their own innovation stories into the history of aviation. 

The centerpiece of the main gallery is the Airbus 320 "Miracle on the Hudson" aircraft that was successfully landed on New York's Hudson River by Captain C.B. "Sully" Sullenberger. About half of the 155 passengers and crew on board were coming home to the Charlotte Region on that fateful day.
properties.rankingString: #9 of 399 things to do in Charlotte
properties.name: Sullenberger Aviation Museum

properties.description: Using history to build community, Levine Museum of the New South offers rotating and traveling exhibitions that explore issues relevant to the history of the greater Charlotte metro area and spark curiosity about our world today. Their exhibitions and public programs welcome all participants to engage deeply with the diversity of our region’s communities through stories of the past that encourage productive dialogue and deepen understanding of critical contemporary issues.

properties.description: Designed by Machado and Silvetti Associates of Boston, the five-story, 145,000-square-foot facility combines inspiring architecture with cutting-edge exhibitions to provide visitors with unparalleled educational and cultural experiences. Located in the heart of Charlotte's burgeoning city center, Mint Museum Uptown is an integral part of the Levine Center for the Arts, a cultural campus that includes the Bechtler Museum of Modern Art, the Harvey B. Gantt Center for African-American Arts and Culture, the Knight Theater, and the Duke Energy Center. Mint Museum Uptown also features a wide range of visitor amenities, including the 240-seat James B. Duke Auditorium, the Lewis Family Gallery, art studios, a restaurant, and a museum shop.

properties.name: Charlotte Lane
properties.description: Welcome to Charlotte Lane Cafe & Gift Shop. Best Small Restaurant in Nova Scotia Award from RANS 2013, Best Restaurant Chef Inspired Casual Dining by Taste of NS 2011, Best Restaurant outside of HRM by Chronical Herald. Follow the fabulous aromas down our quaint little lane in the historic district of Shelburne, Nova Scotia, step inside our heritage building and enjoy the warm hospitality and fine dining. Our restaurant offers innovative dishes and fine wines presented with attentive service in a cheerful setting. Since opening in 1995 we have attracted loyal and appreciative clients from near and far, and we invite you to join this happy circle.
properties.address: 13 Charlotte Lane Seasonal business in the historic district, Shelburne, Nova Scotia B0T 1W0 Canada

properties.name: ROKA Charlotte Street
properties.description: ROKA Charlotte Street serves contemporary Japanese robatayaki cuisine in striking yet informal surroundings in the heart of London�s media district. Dominated by the centrally located robata grill, fish, poultry, meat, and vegetables are prepared in full view of diners at the surrounding counter and tables. In warm weather, the glass walls open onto the street outside creating a semi-alfresco ambience throughout. During summer, outside tables are available for dining.

properties.name: The Capital Grille
properties.description: Make it a day to remember. From birthdays and anniversaries to professional milestones, we aim to make every gathering special at The Capital Grille. Open seven days a week, The Capital Grille is best known for our expertly prepared steaks, which are dry aged in house for 18 to 24 days and then hand-cut by our restaurant's on-premise butcher. The Capital Grille's wine list features more than 350 selections, and its floor-to-ceiling wine kiosk regularly houses 3,500 - 5,000 bottles. Reservations are recommended but not required. For more information, please visit our website. We look forward to delighting you.

properties.name: Cabo Fish Taco Baja Seagrill
properties.description: Cabo Fish Taco is serves lunch and dinner, seven days a week. Serving fresh Baja Mexican Cuisine, featuring fresh seafood, chicken and steak. Cabo has a full bar, featuring over 13 original margaritas and a huge tequila list. In door and outdoor seating available. Also, offering a full to go menu.

properties.name: The Fig Tree Restaurant
properties.description: Chef-owned and operated, The Fig Tree Restaurant is located just minutes from Uptown in a beautifully restored 1913 bungalow. Chef Zanitsch's cuisine is Country European with an emphasis on wine pairing. The wine list is not only award-winning but also affordable; the service unsurpassed. Beautiful fireplaces glow in the fall and winter while alfresco dining on the veranda is a must in the spring and summer.

properties.description: Our subterranean restaurant and bar, Gaucho Charlotte Street is located in design-centric and international foodie destination, Fitzrovia. Since opening in 2008 it has become a beloved boutique spot for locals and media executives alike. As you enter you’ll be warmly welcomed by our impressive private wine room before descending into the chic surroundings of the main restaurant. Charlotte Street is all about theatre; the dramatic Buenos Aires inspired interiors, the theatre of the open kitchen and seamless service but it is also famous for its immersive culinary Film Club.
